channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Xiaomi unveiled an EV feature that Tesla promised back in 2014… but it could make charging a lot easier
item.description: Chinese tech giant unveils automatic EV charging solution

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Tuesday, June 16 (game #1604)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Tuesday, June 16 (game #1101)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Tuesday, June 16 (game #835)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Why IMEC’s new 6G chip breakthrough is exactly what Nvidia’s Jensen Huang is looking for right now
item.description: Imec's recent breakthrough solves an efficiency issue that could drive the Nvidia CEO's vision of an AI-driven revolution in the telecom industry.

item.title: Quote of the day by Apple CEO Tim Cook: 'If you put a key under the mat for the cops, a burglar can find it, too' — a stark warning on threats to undermine privacy
item.description: Apple's outgoing chief executive has long been a proponent of pro-privacy systems, especially end-to-end encryption

item.title: 'AI will probably most likely lead to the end of the world, but in the meantime, there’ll be great companies' - quote of the day by OpenAI CEO Sam Altman
item.description: Sam Altman has purported publicly for years that AI safety is critical

item.title: Amazon just quietly discounted some of its best AeroPress kits just in time for Father's Day — including 20% off our very favorite accessory
item.description: If you haven't sorted your Father's Day gift yet, Amazon has come to your rescue.

item.title: That book idea in your notes app could finally become reality with this $40 tool
item.description: Get creating with this lifetime subscription to the EbookMagic Starter Plan and make all your book ideas come to life for just $39.99.

item.title: Get the full Office Pro 2021 suite for a one-time $33 payment
item.description: Get Microsoft Office Professional 2021 for Windows for just $32.97 through June 14 and unlock lifetime access to Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, Teams, and more.

item.title: 3 months of ChatGPT costs what ChatOn charges for 3 years of GPT, Claude, and Gemini
item.description: Get three years of paid-tier access to GPT, Claude, Gemini, and Sonar in one app for $69.99.

item.title: How to watch Iran vs. New Zealand online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Iran vs. New Zealand in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free.

item.title: Prime Day isnt here yet, but these 3 noise-cancelling headphones are already at record prices
item.description: Mashable's audio expert found the best Prime Day deals on noise-cancelling headphones from brands like Sony, Apple, and Nothing.

item.title: The US government’s Anthropic models ban was never about an AI jailbreak
item.description: The Trump administration's decision that forced Anthropic to pull its latest cybersecurity models could be reactionary, retaliatory, or both, but the message is clear: The AI industry isn't immune from U.S. government interference.

item.title: Google Earth's flight simulator mode is now available in your browser
item.description: Up, up and away! (Just try not to crash.)

item.title: Meta CTO Andrew Bosworth Admits the Company’s AI Reorg Was ‘Atrocious’
item.description: In an internal memo seen by WIRED, Bosworth promised employees more stability, better communication, and the return of workplace perks as the company seeks to improve morale.

item.title: Xbox plans layoffs, even after Microsoft CEO said company is ‘long on gaming’
item.description: Xbox is “planning major job cuts” in July after Asha Sharma stepped in as CEO, according to Bloomberg. In July, Xbox may be the next company hit with major changes to its workforce.

item.title: Un guide pour accompagner les entreprises avec l’adoption de l’IA
item.description: Québec offre désormais un guide pour les entreprises qui souhaitent implanter « de façon responsable » un système d’intelligence artificielle (IA) dans leur organisation.

item.title: Facebook’s new AI Mode search gets its info from public posts
item.description: Your public Facebook posts could help inform AI-generated results in Meta's new AI Mode. When you search on Facebook, the "AI Mode" option will appear alongside the usual search modes like "People" and "Marketplace." It's one of several new AI features Meta is rolling out starting today, including photo presets that swap sports jerseys onto […]

item.title: Xbox is closing down Hellblade creator Ninja Theory
item.description: Xbox is closing down Ninja Theory, the studio behind the Hellblade series, a source tells The Verge. Staffers were told on a call on Monday about the closure, but they are hoping the studio will find a buyer. The closure comes as "several" Xbox studios at Microsoft, including Compulsion Games and Double Fine, are in […]

item.title: Xbox executives depart while Compulsion Games shuts down
item.description: The head of Xbox Game Studios departed the company just hours before Xbox shut down its Compulsion Games subsidiary.

item.title: The Future Of Autonomy
item.description: A human’s guide to navigating the next wave of AI
